command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); cp tests/parity/artifacts/baseline-report.json "$tmpdir/report.json"; node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const p=process.argv[1];const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8"));const lane=r.lanes.find(x=>x.name==="repo-mode-coding-loop");lane.status="failed";lane.failedPhase="test";lane.skipReason="repo-mode-coding-loop failed during test";lane.artifactPath="tests/fixtures/recordings/repo-mode-parity-web-task.failed-test.json";r.repoInstalledComparison.repoArtifactPath=lane.artifactPath;r.repoInstalledComparison.divergencePhases=["test"];r.repoInstalledComparison.phaseComparisons=r.repoInstalledComparison.phaseComparisons.map(ph=>ph.phase==="test"?{...ph,repoStatus:"failed",installedStatus:"passed",matches:false}:ph);fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(r,null,2)+"\n")' "$tmpdir/report.json"; node --experimental-strip-types tests/parity/release-gate.ts --report "$tmpdir/report.json" --format json; status=$?; rm -rf "$tmpdir"; exit $status
